basic_details.job_title: DHS Lohardaga Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 61 Accountant, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the Civil Surgeon-cum-Chief Medical Officer, Lohardaga, Jharkhand has released the Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026 (Advertisement No. 02/2026) for 23 contractual posts across multiple health programmes under the National Health Mission. Candidates with qualifications ranging from 10+2 to Post Graduate can apply. Applications must reach the office by 24 July 2026 at 5:00 PM via registered post or speed post. The minimum age for all posts is 21 years, calculated as of 31 May 2026.

application_fee.details: The application fee must be submitted as a Demand Draft drawn in favour of District Health Society, Lohardaga, payable at Lohardaga. Candidates applying for multiple posts must submit separate applications and separate fees for each post. The fee is non-refundable under all circumstances.

age_limit.details: The minimum age for all posts is 21 years . Maximum age limits vary by category, calculated as of 31 May 2026 . | Category Max Age (General) Max Age (Divyang) Unreserved (UR) 35 years 45 years OBC / EBC 37 years 47 years Female (UR/EWS/OBC/EBC) 38 years 48 years SC / ST (Male & Female) 40 years 50 years EWS 35 years 45 years | Ex-servicemen receive an additional 5-year age relaxation over the prescribed maximum limit for their respective category.

qualification.details: Eligibility for the Lohardaga NHM Bharti 2026 varies post to post. Candidates must carefully match their qualifications to the specific post before applying, as no two posts carry identical requirements. how_to_apply: Applications for this Lohardaga NHM Vacancy 2026 are accepted only through registered post or speed post - walk-in submissions and hand-delivered applications are strictly not accepted. Candidates applying for more than one post must send separate applications in separate envelopes, each with a separate Demand Draft.
Download the official application form from the notification (Appendix format provided in the PDF).
Type/computerize the application form - handwritten forms are not accepted.
Fill in all required details: post name, post code, personal information, educational qualifications, experience, and registration details.

Attach self-attested copies of all educational mark sheets and certificates, experience certificates, driving license (where required), caste/domicile/EWS certificate, and matriculation certificate as date of birth proof.
Attach the Demand Draft of the applicable fee payable to District Health Society, Lohardaga.
Write clearly on the envelope: Advertisement No., Post Code, Post Name, and Applicant's Name and Address.
Send the sealed envelope to the address below via Registered Post or Speed Post before 24 July 2026 at 5:00 PM.
Application Address: Asainik Shalya Chikitsak Sah Mukhya Chikitsa Padadhikari Karyalay, Sadar Aspatal Parisar, Post + District – Lohardaga, Jharkhand – 835302
important_instructions: Candidates claiming reservation under any category must submit valid Jharkhand domicile and caste certificates in the prescribed formats. Domicile certificates issued before 2 June 2016 at Sub-Divisional level and before 19 July 2019 at Anchal level are not valid. Caste certificates issued under earlier formats or by unauthorized authorities are also not accepted. Certificates must match the name spelling exactly with the Matriculation certificate, otherwise they will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
Important Dates – Lohardaga District Health Society Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates planning to apply for the Lohardaga NHM Vacancy 2026 must note the following critical dates. The application window opened on 25 June 2026 and closes on 24 July 2026 at 5:00 PM . No applications will be accepted after the deadline, and hand-delivered applications will not be entertained under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Lohardaga NHM Vacancy 2026 – Post-Wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026 notification lists vacancies across 23 post codes under programmes like NTEP, NCVBDC, NHM, NMHP, SNCU, ARSH Cell, RBSK, NUHM, and MTC. Each post has a designated post code, and applicants must clearly mention the post code on the envelope. The total sanctioned posts and currently vacant posts are listed below.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria – Lohardaga Health Department Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligibility for the Lohardaga NHM Bharti 2026 varies post to post. Candidates must carefully match their qualifications to the specific post before applying, as no two posts carry identical requirements. The minimum essential qualification ranges from Matriculation (10th) for some posts to Post Graduate degree for others. The minimum age for all posts is 21 years . Maximum age limits vary by category, calculated as of 31 May 2026 . Ex-servicemen receive an additional 5-year age relaxation over the prescribed maximum limit for their respective category.

rows.essential_qualification: Graduate in Commerce + 2 years experience in double-entry accounts in a recognized society/institution + accounting software experience (min. 2 years)
Post Graduate + 1 year experience in communication/ACSM/PPP/Health projects + permanent two-wheeler driving license
Graduate or Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from a Govt. recognized institute + two-wheeler driving license + computer course (min. 2 months)
Bachelor's degree or Recognized Sanitary Inspector's course + computer operation certificate (min. 2 months) + two-wheeler driving license
Master's/Bachelor's degree in any subject (Hons/Pass) with Diploma or Certificate in Nutrition + basic computer skills
Diploma in Cooking/Hotel Management/Catering OR Matriculation with 2 years cooking experience
PG Degree in Psychology/Applied Psychology + M.Phil in Mental Health and Social Psychology from a full-time 2-year course recognized by Rehabilitation Council of India
PG degree after minimum 2-year course in mental health or psychiatric social work
Graduate (preferably Biology); valid two-wheeler driving license; experience in health-related programmes preferred
Graduate in Commerce / Qualified SAS Accountant or equivalent + minimum 5 years experience in accounting, budgeting, financial software
Matric + ITI Certificate in Refrigeration & Air Conditioning + minimum 3 years experience in cold chain repair
12th or Intermediate with Science + 3 years experience in vaccine Cold Chain handling
10+2 Intermediate + Diploma in X-ray Technology/Radiology from Govt. recognized institution + minimum 2 years Medical Lab experience + registered under Jharkhand Paramedical Council

Graduation from recognized university + 1-year Diploma in Computer Application or PG Diploma / DOEACC 'O' level or Bachelor in Computer Application/B.Sc. (IT) + minimum 2 years post-qualification experience + typing speed 40 WPM (English)
10+2 or Intermediate + 3 years General Nursing and Midwifery from a Govt. recognized institution + registered under Jharkhand Nursing Council
10+2 or equivalent + ANM course from Govt. recognized institution approved by INC + registered under Jharkhand Nursing Council
PG degree in Psychology/Social Work/Sociology/Anthropology/Human Development OR Diploma in Nursing with 1–3 years experience in Adolescent Work
Diploma in Pharmacy from recognized institute + registered under Jharkhand State Pharmacy Council + MS Office & Internet proficiency
10+2 or Intermediate + Diploma in Lab Technician from Govt. recognized institute + 1 year experience + registered under Jharkhand Paramedical Council

content_sections.heading: Application Fee – Lohardaga NHM Apply Online 2026
content_sections.text: The application fee must be submitted as a Demand Draft drawn in favour of District Health Society, Lohardaga , payable at Lohardaga. Candidates applying for multiple posts must submit separate applications and separate fees for each post. The fee is non-refundable under all circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Monthly Stipend – Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates selected under the Lohardaga District Health Society Recruitment 2026 will be engaged on a contractual basis and will receive a fixed monthly honorarium. The pay listed below is the monthly contractual stipend and is not equivalent to regular government pay scales. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Selection Process – Lohardaga NHM Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: The selection process for the Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026 is merit-based and involves a written examination followed by document verification. Candidates should prepare accordingly as the written test carries the majority of the weightage in the final merit list. Written Examination (60 marks): Objective, multiple-choice questions; duration of 1 hour. Academic/Training Score (40 marks): Marks are awarded based on percentage obtained in qualifying examinations as per the prescribed scoring formula. Skill Test (if applicable): For select posts, a skill test may be conducted, which is qualifying in nature only and does not contribute to the merit score. Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must present original certificates at the time of verification. Final Merit List: Prepared by the District Selection Committee, Lohardaga, and published on the official district website and notice boards. The merit list will remain valid for one year from the date of publication. The written test will be held separately for vacancies under different programmes. For ANM and paramedical posts: 10+2 score of 50–64% = 10 marks; 65–79% = 15 marks; 80–100% = 20 marks. Training/paramedical training score follows the same slab. For non-paramedical posts: 50–64% = 10 marks; 65–79% = 20 marks; 80–100% = 30 marks, plus up to 10 marks for relevant higher qualifications.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply – Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026 Offline Application
content_sections.text: Applications for this Lohardaga NHM Vacancy 2026 are accepted only through registered post or speed post - walk-in submissions and hand-delivered applications are strictly not accepted. Candidates applying for more than one post must send separate applications in separate envelopes, each with a separate Demand Draft. Application Address: Asainik Shalya Chikitsak Sah Mukhya Chikitsa Padadhikari Karyalay, Sadar Aspatal Parisar, Post + District – Lohardaga, Jharkhand – 835302

content_sections.heading: Required Documents – What to Attach With Your Application
content_sections.text: Applicants for the Lohardaga District Health Society Recruitment 2026 must ensure all mandatory documents are enclosed at the time of application. Missing documents submitted later will not be considered, and candidature can be cancelled at any stage if discrepancies are found. Self-attested copies of all educational mark sheets and certificates (from Matriculation onwards) Self-attested experience certificate (from Govt. recognized/approved institutions only — volunteer work not counted) Self-attested copy of valid two-wheeler driving license (for applicable posts) Caste certificate in the format prescribed by Jharkhand Government (Appendix III, IV, or V) Domicile/Local Resident Certificate of Jharkhand (Appendix I or II as applicable) EWS Income and Asset Certificate in Appendix VI format (if applying under EWS category) Registration certificate under Jharkhand Paramedical / Nursing / Pharmacy Council (for applicable posts) Matriculation certificate for date of birth verification Two recent passport-size photographs (self-attested) Demand Draft of applicable application fee CGPA conversion chart (if CGPA score is mentioned instead of percentage)

content_sections.heading: Domicile & Caste Certificate Rules – Lohardaga NHM 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates claiming reservation under any category must submit valid Jharkhand domicile and caste certificates in the prescribed formats. Domicile certificates issued before 2 June 2016 at Sub-Divisional level and before 19 July 2019 at Anchal level are not valid. Caste certificates issued under earlier formats or by unauthorized authorities are also not accepted. Certificates must match the name spelling exactly with the Matriculation certificate, otherwise they will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid – Lohardaga NHM Application 2026
content_sections.text: Many applications get rejected each year for avoidable errors. Here are the most important pitfalls to watch out for when applying for the Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: Terms and Conditions of Contractual Appointment
content_sections.text: All posts under the Lohardaga NHM Bharti 2026 are purely contractual. Candidates must note the following service conditions before applying. There is no permanent employment — an indemnity bond must be signed before joining confirming no claim to regularization. The contract is valid for one year and may be extended annually based on Annual Performance Appraisal. The contract can be terminated with one month's notice or one month's honorarium in lieu of notice. Monthly stipend is indicative and may be revised as per government directives. The decision of the District Selection Committee, Lohardaga, is final and binding in all matters of selection. District-level reservation roster will be followed for all posts.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 24 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications received after this date or hand-delivered to the office will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are available in Lohardaga NHM Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 23 posts are vacant across 23 post codes under programmes including NTEP, NHM, NMHP, NCVBDC, SNCU, MTC, ARSH, RBSK, and NUHM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for Lohardaga NHM Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹400 for UR/EWS/OBC/EBC candidates and ₹200 for SC/ST candidates. Persons with 40% or more disability are fully exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum age to apply for Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 21 years, calculated as of 31 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Can I apply online for Lohardaga District Health Society Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. This recruitment is offline only. Applications must be sent via registered post or speed post. Online applications are not accepted for this notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Lohardaga NHM posts?
faq.answer: Candidates are selected through a written examination (60 marks) and academic/training score (40 marks), followed by document verification. A skill test may be conducted for select posts but is only qualifying in nature.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Staff Nurse under NHM Lohardaga?
faq.answer: Staff Nurses under NHM Lohardaga will receive a monthly contractual stipend of ₹16,564/-.

faq.question: Q8. Is the appointment permanent?
faq.answer: No. All appointments are strictly on a contractual basis for one year, extendable based on performance. There is no right to regularization or permanency.

faq.question: Q9. Which caste certificate format is valid for reservation claims in Lohardaga NHM 2026?
faq.answer: Only certificates in the formats prescribed in Appendix III, IV, or V of the notification, issued by competent authorities after the specified cut-off dates, are valid. Older formats or certificates from unauthorized levels are not accepted.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I check the merit list for Lohardaga NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The final merit list will be published on the official district website at https://lohardaga.nic.in/ and on the notice boards of the CMO office, Civil Surgeon's office, and District Employment Office, Lohardaga.

faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 24 July 2026 by 5:00 PM. Applications received after this date or hand-delivered to the office will not be accepted.
